title: MATANA 25 Premium White Plastic Dessert Plates with Gold Rim (19cm / 7 Inch) – Elegant & Reusable Side Plates for Weddings, Birthdays, Picnic, BBQ, Parties & Events
features: ELEGANT DESIGN: Our premium small plastic plates with gold rim are designed to add an elegant touch to any event. The gold edge adds a touch of luxury and sophistication, making them ideal for formal occasions. The design is elegant and stylish, allowing them to complement a variety of table settings.

PERFECT SIZE : Our 19cm diameter dessert plates are the perfect canvas for your culinary creations. They aren't just great for serving desserts; they're also versatile enough to showcase sides, appetisers, salads, and an array of delectable small bites. From cakes to pies, tarts to cupcakes, and beyond, these plates effortlessly elevate every dish you serve.

PERFECT FOR ANY OCCASION: Whether it's a wedding, birthday, christening, BBQ, Christmas celebration, picnic, garden party, family gathering, or corporate event, these reusable plastic plates are designed to suit any occasion. Their timeless design complements a wide range of themes and settings.

PREMIUM QUALITY, HEAT RESISTANT & UNBREAKABLE : Crafted from high-quality PP plastic, these party plates are not only elegant but also incredibly sturdy. They are heat-resistant and virtually unbreakable, ensuring your guests' safety and peace of mind during every event.

REUSABLE & EASY TO CLEAN : Although our gold plastic plates are dishwasher safe, hand washing is recommended to preserve their elegant design and gold rim. Please avoid using harsh cleaning agents or prolonged soaking to maintain their beauty.
description: Product Description Elegance Redefined Indulge in sophistication with our Plastic White & Gold tableware, ideal for main courses, starters, desserts, and appetizers. Each piece brings an elegant touch to your dining experience. Premium Quality Immerse yourself in quality and durability. Our shatterproof design ensures a premium feel, perfect for all occasions—weddings, birthdays, formal events, or a simple outdoor BBQ or picnic. Versatile Glamour Unleashed From weddings to casual gatherings, our tableware adds glamour effortlessly. Suitable for indoor and outdoor use, it's the ideal choice for christenings, Christmas, birthdays, and more. Celebrate in style, anytime, anywhere. Wash and Reuse Our white and gold tableware are reusable, making them a sustainable choice. After your event, cleaning them is a breeze – simply wash them with mild soap and warm water, and they're ready for your next gathering. Previous page Wedding Make your wedding venue a masterpiece with Matana's stunning tableware collection. Picnic Brighten up your picnic spread with our range of tableware. Party Matana Plates and Bowls bring style, functionality, and elegance to your dining table.
